scripts.sync: pnpm --filter anypost-core build && pnpm --filter anypost-web build && pnpm exec cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: mkdir -p ../../.android-user ../../.android-sdk && export ANDROID_USER_HOME="$(cd ../.. && pwd)/.android-user" ANDROID_HOME="${ANDROID_HOME:-$(cd ../.. && pwd)/.android-sdk}" ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-${ANDROID_HOME:-$(cd ../.. && pwd)/.android-sdk}}" && pnpm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
